title: adding graphify to my claude OS
summary: Chase AI demonstrates integrating Graphify into a Claude-based operating system. The integration appears to be a customization or enhancement of a Claude AI framework.
writeup: Chase AI walks through integrating a tool called Graphify into a Claude-based operating system, presented as a customization of a Claude AI framework. The demonstration centers on extending an agent framework that runs on the Claude API. The takeaway is a worked example of adding a new capability to an existing Claude setup rather than building from scratch.
